{{Infobox construct
| name = Jadeclaw Rings
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Jadeclaw Rings]] are constructs used by [[Calan Archer]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan]] possesses [[Jadeclaw Rings]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] had seven [[Jadeclaw Rings]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
